data.body: TIER B COMPLETE. All children closed: rely-suede-chase (tag/untag), peak-fawn-bug (archive), slum-visor-snail (create/edit/link/unlink/revert), bored-nape-kin (flip+soak+retire). Python is the sole leaf-write impl; switch + 9 bash leaf functions deleted (ticket-lib-api.sh 2367->1109). Commits 671be954..845a220d. Closing the Tier B umbrella.
